manifest.title: Game Streamer
manifest.author: Game Streamer
manifest.description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
manifest.tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
manifest.postInstallMessage: Configure Keycloak via environment variables: VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID.
